content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Enhanced backend error diagnostics by: (1) enriching runtime log stage_failed entries with failure_class and full error message, (2) adding stdout/stderr sizes to schema validation error messages in process_backend so raw output context propagates without cross-referencing journal.ndjson, (3) enabling Claude CLI --verbose flag for richer diagnostic output on failures, and (4) adding 4 new tests covering all enhanced error paths.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Enrich runtime log stage_failed entry in engine.rs (line ~5058) to include failure_class.as_str() and error.to_string() alongside existing cycle/attempt/retry fields
2. [Completed] Add stdout_len and stderr_tail to Claude envelope JSON parse failure error message in process_backend.rs (invalid envelope path)
3. [Completed] Add stdout_len to Claude result JSON parse failure error message in process_backend.rs (invalid result path)
4. [Completed] Add stdout_len and stderr_len to Codex last-message JSON parse failure and transport failure error messages in process_backend.rs
5. [Completed] Enable Claude CLI --verbose flag in build_command() to capture richer diagnostic output (stderr) on CLI errors like timeouts, rate limits, and auth failures
6. [Skipped] Investigate Codex CLI for equivalent --verbose/--debug flag; determined Codex already outputs full NDJSON event stream to stdout which is captured, no equivalent verbose flag exists
7. [Completed] Add test: finish_claude_invalid_envelope_includes_stdout_len_and_stderr — verifies invalid envelope error includes stdout_len and stderr_tail
8. [Completed] Add test: finish_claude_invalid_result_json_includes_stdout_len — verifies invalid result JSON error includes result_len and stdout_len
9. [Completed] Add test: build_command_claude_includes_verbose_flag — verifies --verbose is present in Claude CLI args
10. [Completed] Add test: finish_codex_invalid_last_message_includes_output_sizes — verifies Codex schema validation error includes stdout_len and stderr_len
11. [Completed] Run cargo test, cargo clippy, cargo fmt --check — all pass (2 pre-existing checkpoint test failures unrelated to changes)

## Validation Evidence

- 4 new tests pass: finish_claude_invalid_envelope_includes_stdout_len_and_stderr, finish_claude_invalid_result_json_includes_stdout_len, build_command_claude_includes_verbose_flag, finish_codex_invalid_last_message_includes_output_sizes
- 585 existing lib tests pass (0 regressions)
- 755 total tests pass; 2 pre-existing failures in checkpoint_test.rs (unrelated NotFound errors)
- cargo fmt --check passes with no formatting issues
- cargo clippy shows no new warnings in modified files (engine.rs, process_backend.rs); 16 pre-existing warnings in other files

## Outstanding Risks

- Claude CLI --verbose flag behavior is not documented in the codebase; if a future Claude CLI version changes --verbose semantics or adds extra stdout output, the JSON envelope parsing could be affected — though --output-format json should take precedence
- Codex CLI has no equivalent --verbose flag; transient Codex CLI failures still rely on captured stderr and the runtime/failed/*.failed.raw artifacts for diagnosis
